title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, a reasoning model, Scout, an always-on agent for work, MDASH, and Majorana 2, a quantum chip. This represents Microsoft's full-stack AI strategy to compete with OpenAI, Claude, and Google across models, agents, and quantum hardware.
